library.description: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3: النوافذ، الإدخال، الأحداث، الصوت، والرسم الأساسي.

kind.description: استدعاءات تنفذ فعلاً، تغيّر حالة، أو تعيد نتيجة، أو تبني مورداً.

identity.name: SDL_LockRWLockForReading
identity.titleArabic: قفل read/write lock read only operations

summary.actualTranslationArabic: قفل read/write lock read only operations
summary.actualMeaningArabic: قفل read/write lock read only operations.
summary.purposeArabic: تستخدم هذه الدالة عندما تحتاج إلى قفل read/write lock read only operations داخل التطبيق أو داخل مسار التنفيذ المرتبط بها.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا هي الأثر التنفيذي الذي يحدثه الاستدعاء أو النتيجة التي يعيدها إلى التطبيق.
summary.carriedValueArabic: القيمة العملية لهذا الاستدعاء تظهر في ناتجه void وفي التغيير الذي يحدثه على المورد أو الحالة المرتبطة به.
summary.sourceDescription: Lock the read/write lock for read only operations.

parameters.name: rwlock
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل rwlock من النوع SDL_RWLock * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.

remarks:
This will block until the rwlock is available, which is to say it is
not locked for writing by any other thread. Of all threads waiting to
lock the rwlock, all may do so at the same time as long as they are
requesting read-only access; if a thread wants to lock for writing, only
one may do so at a time, and no other threads, read-only or not, may
hold the lock at the same time.

It is legal for the owning thread to lock an already-locked rwlock
for reading. It must unlock it the same number of times before it is
actually made available for other threads in the system (this is known
as a "recursive rwlock").

Note that locking for writing is not recursive (this is only
available to read-only locks).

It is illegal to request a read-only lock from a thread that already
holds the write lock. Doing so results in undefined behavior. Unlock the
write lock before requesting a read-only lock. (But, of course, if you
have the write lock, you don't need further locks to read in any
case.)

This function does not fail; if rwlock is NULL, it will return
immediately having locked nothing. If the rwlock is valid, this function
will always block until it can lock the mutex, and return with it
locked.
details.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
